mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM notifications WHERE recipient_user_id = #{recipientUserId} AND is_read = 0

SELECT n.id, n.recipient_user_id, n.actor_user_id, n.event_type, n.target_type, n.target_id, n.post_id, n.metadata, n.is_read, n.created_at, u.username AS actor_username FROM notifications n LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = n.actor_user_id WHERE n.recipient_user_id = #{recipientUserId} ORDER BY n.created_at DESC, n.id DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT n.id, n.recipient_user_id, n.actor_user_id, n.event_type, n.target_type, n.target_id, n.post_id, n.metadata, n.is_read, n.created_at, u.username AS actor_username FROM notifications n LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = n.actor_user_id WHERE n.id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE notifications SET is_read = 1 WHERE recipient_user_id = #{recipientUserId} AND is_read = 0
